title: CapabilitiesRegistry
description: Structured declaration of what an agent can do, intended for evaluator discovery and scenario targeting. An AEP-compliant agent MUST publish this as part of its AgentContract. Capabilities here are evaluation-facing (what the agent claims to handle) and are distinct from MCP tool capabilities (what external tools the agent invokes).

domains.description: Subject-matter areas this agent claims competence in. MUST be non-empty. Evaluators MUST NOT score against domains not declared here.

actions.description: Verbs the agent claims to perform. MUST be non-empty.

modalities.description: I/O modalities supported. Text is the baseline; any agent supporting evaluation MUST support text.

languages.description: Natural languages the agent commits to handling. Evaluators SHOULD NOT submit scenarios in undeclared languages.

outOfScope.description: Domains or actions the agent explicitly disclaims. Findings claiming failure in these areas SHOULD be rejected by triage.

qualityClaims.description: Self-reported quality levels per domain/action. Evaluators MAY verify these.

inputContract.description: Reference to a JSON Schema or description of input shape for this action.

outputContract.description: Reference to a JSON Schema or description of output shape.

evidence.description: Pointer to benchmark results or evaluation reports.
